description: Write docs/intro/17-reading-the-plan-uvp.md for a coder with LOW experience: friendly, zero-assumed-knowledge, every concept introduced before use, every term glossary-linked on first use. Warm, nerdy, encouraging tone — 'made with love for creators of all kind' is the voice of this lane.
